stories.headline: Trump signs executive order to reduce regulatory barriers for fintech and digital assets
stories.body:
President Trump signed an executive order to reduce regulatory barriers for fintech firms and supporting the integration of digital assets into traditional finance and payment systems.

The order directs federal financial regulators to review existing rules, guidance, and licensing processes that may limit innovation or restrict partnerships between fintech companies and federally regulated institutions.

A major focus is digital assets and blockchain-based services. The Federal Reserve is asked to evaluate whether non-bank financial companies, including digital asset firms, can directly access Fed payment accounts and payment services.

Regulators have 90 days to identify barriers, while the Federal Reserve has 120 days to deliver its findings and recommendations to the White House.

stories.headline: Easy homemade kongguksu recipe using tofu and soy milk
stories.body: 일본 트친의 요청으로 만드는 콩국수 레시피!아울러 한국 사람도 콩국수 먹고 싶은데 늦은 시간 파는데 없을때 야매 콩국수 만드는 법.준비물: 두부 1모, 두유 1팩, 땅콩버터 1스푼, 설탕 반 스푼, 소금 반 스푼, 얼음 2개.만드는 법: 위에 준비물 다 믹서기에 넣고 갈기.끝!*땅콩버터 없을 땐 참깨 두 스푼으로 대체.コングクスが食べたい！でも遅い時間で店が開いてない時の「超簡単ヤミツキ・コングクス」の作り方。【準備するもの】豆腐：1丁豆乳：1パックピーナッツバター：スプーン1杯砂糖：スプーン半分塩：スプーン半分氷：2個【作り方】上の材料をすべてミキサーに入れて混ぜるだけ。以上！※ピーナッツバターがない時は、すりごま大さじ2杯で代用OK！

stories.headline: GitHub reports investigation into unauthorized access to internal repositories via poisoned VS Code extension.
stories.body: We are investigating unauthorized access to GitHub’s internal repositories. While we currently have no evidence of impact to customer information stored outside of GitHub’s internal repositories (such as our customers’ enterprises, organizations, and repositories), we are closely monitoring our infrastructure for follow-on activity.

stories.headline: GitHub details employee device compromise using poisoned VS Code extension.
stories.body:
1/ We are sharing additional details regarding our investigation into unauthorized access to GitHub's internal repositories.

Yesterday we detected and contained a compromise of an employee device involving a poisoned VS Code extension. We removed the malicious extension version, isolated the endpoint, and began incident response immediately.

stories.headline: Engineered immune cells show promise as functional cure for HIV in early patient data
stories.body:
A recent breakthrough might provide a ‘functional cure’ for HIV

Scientists at Caring Cross infused immune cells engineered to target HIV, and after 2 patients were injected, the virus was undetectable

stories.headline: More than 17,000 people under evacuation orders in Southern California due to Sandy Fire.
stories.body:
More than 17,000 people were under evacuation orders in Southern California on Tuesday as a wildfire threatened suburban homes.

The wind-driven Sandy Fire was reported Monday in the hills above Simi Valley about 30 miles northwest of Los Angeles.

stories.headline: Sandy Fire in Southern California grows to over 1350 acres
stories.body: UPDATE: 🚨  Sandy Fire in Southern California grows to over 1350 acres.

stories.headline: Choppy winds continue as firefighters battle blazes forcing evacuations in Southern California.
stories.body: Choppy winds will continue across Southern California, where firefighters are battling several blazes that have forced some residents to flee their homes and sent smoke into downtown Los Angeles.

stories.headline: Discussion on why conspiracy theories spread and public distrust
stories.body:
Conspiracy theories are easy to dismiss, but public distrust is more complicated than that. 

This video explores why suspicion spreads, where healthy questioning becomes dangerous, and why some real history still shapes what people believe.

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=R0gOQprr_YA&feature=youtu.be
